profile.tagline: Inventive attacker that pushes initiative early.
profile.quote: If a line has three traps, I would like to examine all three.
The room usually tells you where the pressure belongs.

profile.tagline: Structured planner with strong board control.
profile.quote: A quiet vote can still decide the match.

profile.tagline: Volatile pressure player with upset potential.
profile.quote: Chaos is only bad if you are surprised by it.

profile.tagline: Korean-language anchor with careful social reads.
profile.quote: Nuance matters most when everyone sounds certain.
